description_long: This is a large, ornate wardrobe with three tall, panelled doors and a decorative, arched crown molding at the top. The front features intricate carved detailing along the edges and panels, giving it a classic, vintage French or Victorian appearance. The wardrobe stands on four short, curved legs and has a smooth, painted finish in a light, neutral color. The sides are plain with subtle paneling, while the back is flat and unadorned. Small, curved handles are visible on each door, suggesting easy access to the interior. The overall construction appears to be solid wood, likely with a hollow interior for storage.
description: A large, ornate, light-colored wardrobe with three panelled doors, decorative crown molding, and classic carved details.
description_view_0: Front view showing three panelled doors, ornate crown molding, and decorative handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain, panelled side and the depth of the wardrobe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, unadorned back panel and the wardrobe's overall width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain, panelled side.
